calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-30-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Christian Kim, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First Equity Card Corporation.
Steven H. Bovarnick, Esq. appeared for defendant Sal M. Hassanein, dba Golden Gate Market, who was not present at today's hearing.
Notice of Time and Placed of Trial was filed on August 5, 2009.
Declaration of Tim Clarke in Lieu of Personal Testimony at Trial (CCP Section 98) was filed today, November 30, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on Feburary 9, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff First Equity Card Corporation, and against defendant Sal M. Hassanein, dba Golden Gate Market, as follows:

Principal - $2,683.73.
Interest - $771.80.
Attorney's Fees - $560.00.
Costs - $235.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $4,250.53.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2009 Set For Trial On Nov-30-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Aug-18-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Settlement Conference. Commissioner William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First Equity Card Corporation.
Steven H. Bovarnick, Esq. appeared with defendant Sal M. Hassanein, dba Golden Gate Market, who was placed under oath and examined.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on December 8, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, February 9, 2009.

Terms of the Settlement Agreement were read into the record by Ms. McDonald. In accordance with the agreement of the parties, defendant Sal M. Hassanein, dba Golden Gate Market shall pay plaintiff First Equity Card Corporation the sum of $3,240.00 as follows: $810.00 on March 13, 2009, $810.00 on April 13, 2009, $810.00 on May 13, 2009 & $810.00 on June 13, 2009. If defendant Sal M. Hassanein, dba Golden Gate Market complies with the terms set forth above, plaintiff First Equity Card Corporation shall dismiss this matter without prejudice.

If defendant Sal M. Hassanein, dba Golden Gate Market fails to make any monthly payment, he (defendant) shall have ten (10) days to cure the default. If no payment is not received after the ten day grace period, plaintiff First Equity Card Corporation may obtain judgment, without notice, in the amount of $4,035.00 (minus any payments made by defendant) plus interest.

Ms. McDonald shall reduce the terms of this agreement to writing. Counsel agree to have the written signed by all parties no later than March 6, 2009.

This matter is continued to August 18, 2009 @ 10:00 a.m. in Department 212 on the CRC 3.1385 Dismissal Calendar.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
